metadata.title: Khyaal Engineering Pulse
metadata.description: Real-time engineering pulse for the Core Platform Engineering workspace — tracking epics, OKRs, sprints, releases, and team velocity across Platform, Pulse, and DevOps tracks.
metadata.vision: Become the leading platform for active aging and community engagement for seniors in India, delivering exceptional experiences through technology, personalized service, and meaningful connections.

epics.name: Platform Modernization Epic
epics.objective: Modernize legacy systems and enhance platform capabilities
epics.scope: Website migration, 50Above50 improvements, CRM integration, API enhancements
epics.keyDeliverables: 29 pages migrated, subscription launch, security hardening
epics.successMetrics: Page speed improvement 40%, revenue growth, security compliance 95%+

epics.name: Analytics & Intelligence Epic
epics.objective: Build comprehensive data foundation and AI capabilities
epics.scope: CDP development, analytics dashboards, AI agents, recommendation engines
epics.keyDeliverables: Gold Tier analytics, sales AI agents, ML recommendations
epics.successMetrics: Data-driven decisions 80%+, AI conversion 15%+, recommendation accuracy 85%+

epics.name: Infrastructure Optimization Epic
epics.objective: Optimize cloud infrastructure and enhance security posture
epics.scope: AWS to GCP migration, cost optimization, monitoring setup
epics.keyDeliverables: Cost reduction 30%, improved monitoring, security compliance
epics.successMetrics: Infrastructure cost savings 30%+, system uptime 99.9%+, security response < 1hr

epics.name: Community Bug Resolution
epics.objective: Resolve all critical and high-priority bugs reported by the community across Khyaal Core and 50A50
epics.scope: Digi-gold payment bugs, KCMC card copy, buy membership UX/OTP, renewal fix, Full KYC, 50A50 category/pricing bugs
epics.keyDeliverables: Zero P0 bugs, all community-reported critical issues resolved
epics.successMetrics: P0 bug count = 0, support ticket volume -40%, user satisfaction

epics.name: 50 Above 50 Platform Maturity
epics.objective: Stabilize the 50A50 CRM and website, fix all open issues, and ship app-only entry upload
epics.scope: 50A50 CRM category/pricing bugs, website dashboard/redirect bugs, upload flow improvement, app-only entry upload
epics.keyDeliverables: All 7 critical 50A50 issues resolved, app-only upload live
epics.successMetrics: 50A50 issue count = 0, upload flow completion rate >80%

epics.name: Product Growth Features
epics.objective: Ship engagement and growth features across web and server to increase app downloads and membership revenue
epics.scope: ₹99 plan homepage, Offline Events server API, 50A50 app-only upload server, Voice of Kalinga, Assistant Bot v2.0.1
epics.keyDeliverables: ₹99 on homepage, Offline Events API, app-only upload API, 3 event landing pages
epics.successMetrics: App downloads +20%, membership revenue +15%, 3 events launched on time

epics.name: CMS & Platform Capabilities
epics.objective: Complete CMS admin improvements, roles, insurance landing, and campaign infrastructure
epics.scope: CMS membership details page, individual roles, cache clear, events CMS improvements, insurance landing, Parents Day campaign, Pulse Membership Dashboard
epics.keyDeliverables: Membership details page, 2 new roles, cache clear button, insurance landing, Parents Day campaign
epics.successMetrics: 4-click workflow reduced to 1, 2 roles operational, campaigns launched on time

okrs.objective: Modernize platform infrastructure and achieve security excellence

keyResults.description: Migrate 100% of legacy pages to new platform
Launch $99 subscription tier with payment processing

okrs.objective: Build data-driven decision foundation with AI capabilities

keyResults.description: AI Sales Agent achieving 15%+ conversion rate

okrs.objective: Reduce infrastructure costs and improve reliability
Eliminate critical community-reported bugs across Khyaal Core and 50 Above 50

keyResults.description: All P0/P1 critical bugs resolved (Digi-gold, KCMC, buy membership flow)
7 critical 50A50 issues closed (category change, pricing, dashboard, redirect)
Zero P0 bugs in production at sprint end

okrs.objective: Ship features driving app downloads, membership revenue, and user engagement

keyResults.description: 50A50 app-only upload live to drive app downloads (May 8)

okrs.objective: Complete CMS, roles, insurance, and campaign infrastructure

keyResults.description: CMS membership details page live (reduces 4-click workflow to 1)
Insurance landing page + Parents Day campaign ready by May 8

sprints.name: Foundation Sprint
sprints.goal: Establish platform foundation and security baseline

sprints.name: Migration Sprint
sprints.goal: Complete legacy page migration and launch subscription

sprints.name: Security & AI Sprint
sprints.goal: Complete security hardening, VAPT remediation, and initiate AI Sales Agent development

sprints.name: Enhancement Sprint
sprints.goal: Complete security compliance and launch analytics capabilities

sprints.name: Integration Sprint
sprints.goal: Ship personalization engine, recommendation features, and complete Pulse Gold Tier analytics launch

sprints.name: Community Bug Fix Sprint
sprints.goal: Resolve all critical community bugs, fix 50A50 issues, ship ₹99 plan on homepage, complete Badminton landing page

sprints.name: Feature Delivery Sprint
sprints.goal: Ship Offline Events server API, Voice of Kalinga landing page, 50A50 app upload server side, CMS membership details page

sprints.name: Growth & Campaign Sprint
sprints.goal: Parents Day campaign, Insurance landing page, Pulse Membership Dashboard, Cached Categories Re-Migration

releases.name: v2.1 Platform Foundation
releases.features: 29 legacy pages migrated, $99 subscription launch, basic security
releases.successCriteria: All pages migrated with 30% performance improvement, subscription processing payments
releases.impact: Improved user experience, new revenue stream, security baseline

releases.name: v2.2 Security Hardening
releases.features: VAPT completion, crypto redirect fixes, security monitoring
releases.successCriteria: All critical VAPT issues resolved, security monitoring active

releases.name: v3.0 Analytics Intelligence
releases.features: Gold Tier analytics, AI Sales Agent pilot, CDP dashboards
releases.successCriteria: Analytics dashboards deployed, AI agent pilot running with 10%+ conversion
releases.impact: Data-driven decisions, AI-powered sales, comprehensive analytics

releases.name: v3.1 Personalization Engine
releases.features: Recommendation engines, template-based events, app-code authentication
releases.successCriteria: Recommendation accuracy 85%+, event templates deployed, authentication working
releases.impact: Personalized user experience, scalable event management, seamless authentication

releases.name: v3.2 Community Fix
releases.features: Critical bugs (Digi-gold SIP/one-time, KCMC card copy, buy membership UX/OTP), ₹99 plan on homepage, 50A50 category/pricing/dashboard fixes, CMS improvements (cache clear, tambola ticket, events CMS)
releases.successCriteria: Zero P0 bugs in production, all community-reported critical issues resolved
releases.impact: Restored user trust, unblocked revenue flows, stabilized 50A50 platform

releases.name: v4.0 Feature Release
releases.features: Offline Events server API, Voice of Kalinga landing page, 50A50 app-only upload server, CMS membership details page, Individual roles (Event Manager, Support)
releases.successCriteria: Offline Events API live, 50A50 app upload functional, CMS membership page reduces workflow to 1 click
releases.impact: Increased app downloads, expanded platform capabilities, reduced ops friction

items.note: Implementing Google reCAPTCHA v3 on all user-facing forms to prevent bot submissions and spam.
items.usecase: Reduces spam form submissions by 95%+ and protects platform from automated attacks.
acceptanceCriteria: reCAPTCHA v3 integrated on all forms
Fallback to v2 for low scores
Form submission analytics tracking spam reduction

items.note: Created a dedicated page for the event.
items.usecase: Helps users register and access event details easily.

items.note: Implementing comprehensive event tracking instrumentation across all user touchpoints (page views, clicks, form submissions, navigation events) to capture complete user journey data in Pulse analytics platform.
items.usecase: Enables complete funnel analysis and user journey visualization, reducing blind spots in analytics by 100% and improving conversion optimization capabilities by 40%.
acceptanceCriteria: All critical user events tracked (pageview, click, submit, navigate)
Events appear in Pulse dashboard within 30 seconds
Zero data loss - event buffering and retry logic implemented

items.note: Building automated notification system to track legacy page migration progress with Slack alerts on completion milestones and automated weekly progress reports showing pages migrated, performance improvements, and remaining work.
items.usecase: Reduces manual status update effort by 80%, improves stakeholder visibility, and ensures migration momentum through proactive reporting.
acceptanceCriteria: Slack alerts trigger on migration milestones (25%, 50%, 75%, 100%)
Weekly automated reports generated with migration metrics

items.note: Building headless CMS component library with reusable content blocks (Hero, Feature Grid, Testimonials, CTA, Event Listing) using drag-and-drop interface powered by React Beautiful DnD, enabling marketing team to compose pages without engineering involvement.
items.usecase: Reduces page creation time from 2 days to 2 hours (90% reduction), eliminates engineering bottleneck for marketing campaigns, and improves content iteration velocity by 10x.
acceptanceCriteria: Minimum 5 production-ready blocks (Hero, Features, Testimonials, CTA, Events)
Drag-and-drop builder with live preview functional
Content team trained and can create pages independently
Block library documented with usage examples

items.note: Systematically remediating all critical and high-priority vulnerabilities identified in Vulnerability Assessment and Penetration Testing (VAPT) report including SQL injection risks, XSS vulnerabilities, insecure authentication, missing security headers, and sensitive data exposure.
items.usecase: Achieves 95%+ security compliance target, eliminates critical attack vectors, protects user data, and meets regulatory requirements for secure platform operations.
acceptanceCriteria: All 12 critical VAPT findings resolved and verified

items.note: Implementing secure redirect whitelist validation to prevent open redirect vulnerabilities, adding cryptographic signature verification for redirect URLs, and implementing referrer policy headers to protect against phishing and malicious redirect attacks identified in VAPT audit.
items.usecase: Eliminates open redirect vulnerability (OWASP Top 10), prevents phishing attacks using platform domain as trusted intermediary, and protects users from crypto-related scams leveraging redirect weaknesses.
acceptanceCriteria: Whitelist-based redirect validation enforced for all redirects
HMAC signature verification implemented for dynamic redirects
Malicious redirect attempts logged and blocked
All legitimate user flows tested and working (payment callbacks, OAuth, etc.)

items.note: Building flexible event page template system with pre-designed layouts (Conference, Workshop, Tour, Community Gathering) using parameterized components for rapid event page creation. Templates include registration forms, schedule widgets, speaker profiles, and venue maps with schema.org structured data for SEO.
items.usecase: Reduces event page creation time from 8 hours to <1 hour (87% reduction), ensures consistent UX across all events, improves SEO with structured data, and enables marketing team to launch events independently.
acceptanceCriteria: Minimum 3 event templates deployed (Conference, Workshop, Tour)
Template variables documented (title, date, location, speakers, schedule)
Marketing team can create event page in <1 hour without dev support
All templates include schema.org Event markup for rich snippets

items.text: Legacy page refresh – 29 pages migrated and modernized
items.note: Migrated 29 legacy pages to new platform with modern responsive design, optimized assets, and improved UX patterns.
items.usecase: Improves page speed by 40%, enhances usability, and provides better mobile experience for senior users.
acceptanceCriteria: All 29 pages migrated with responsive design
Page load time improved by 40% minimum
SEO scores above 90 for all pages

items.note: Launched premium subscription tier with Razorpay integration, user dashboard, and automated billing cycles.
items.usecase: Supports recurring revenue model and provides premium features to engaged users.
acceptanceCriteria: Razorpay payment gateway integrated and tested

items.note: Created dedicated event landing page with registration form, countdown timer, and event details.
items.usecase: Helps users register easily and access all event information in one place.
acceptanceCriteria: Event page published with registration form
Countdown timer showing days to event
Integration with CRM for lead capture

items.text: Emailer templates for Travel and Axis Max
items.note: Built reusable, responsive email templates for marketing campaigns with dynamic content blocks.
items.usecase: Speeds up campaign launches and ensures brand consistency across all email communications.
acceptanceCriteria: Two templates created (Travel and Axis Max)

items.note: Improved chatbot interface with better visual design, loading states, and error handling.
items.usecase: Makes customer support interaction smoother and more intuitive for senior users.
acceptanceCriteria: UI redesign with larger touch targets

items.note: Integrated Pulse analytics SDK to track user behavior, page views, and conversion events across the website.
items.usecase: Provides comprehensive analytics for data-driven decision making and user journey optimization.
acceptanceCriteria: Pulse SDK integrated on all website pages
Key events tracking verified (pageview, signup, purchase)

items.note: Conducted root cause analysis for incorrect website redirect to crypto domain. Issue identified in DNS configuration and server routing rules.
items.usecase: Prevents users from being redirected to wrong domains, ensuring brand trust and security.

items.note: Kicked off comprehensive Vulnerability Assessment and Penetration Testing (VAPT) with Appknox security platform for entire web application.
items.usecase: Identifies and mitigates security vulnerabilities early to ensure platform safety and regulatory compliance.

items.note: Creating dedicated event landing page for Rajkot event with localized content, registration form, and venue information.
items.usecase: Helps users in Rajkot region register easily and access event-specific information.
acceptanceCriteria: Event page published with Gujarati language support option
Registration form with Rajkot venue details
Google Maps integration for venue location

items.text: Events listing and joining via Web Zoom SDK
items.note: Allow users to join Zoom events directly from the website without OTP login. Authentication via secure app-generated code or QR code scan with JWT token generation.
items.usecase: Enables seamless event joining from website, reducing friction and improving attendance rates by 30%.
acceptanceCriteria: Zoom Web SDK integrated on event pages
JWT token generation and validation secure

items.text: Khyaal Badminton Championship (Kannur) landing page + comms
items.note: Landing page and communications setup for Khyaal Badminton Championship in Kannur.
items.usecase: Drives registrations and app downloads for the event; surfaces Khyaal brand.
acceptanceCriteria: Landing page live with event details

items.note: Surface ₹99/month plan prominently on the Khyaal homepage to drive new membership signups.
items.usecase: Increases conversion from homepage visitors to paid members by reducing barrier to entry.
acceptanceCriteria: ₹99 plan card visible on homepage above the fold
Clicking CTA leads to correct checkout flow
Plan details accurate (price, features, billing cycle)

items.text: Buy membership popup — mobile number entry UX broken
items.note: Mobile number entry UX in the buy membership popup is broken. Users cannot complete the purchase flow.
items.usecase: Unblocks membership purchase flow on website; critical for revenue.
acceptanceCriteria: Mobile number entry field works correctly
User can proceed to OTP step successfully

items.text: Buy membership popup — multiple OTPs triggered on multiple taps
items.note: Tapping the OTP send button multiple times triggers multiple OTP requests, causing confusion.
items.usecase: Prevents user confusion and OTP flooding; improves purchase conversion.
acceptanceCriteria: OTP button disabled after first tap
Cooldown timer shown before allowing resend
Only one OTP request sent per tap

items.text: Pending migration from old website — complete remaining pages
items.note: Remaining pages from the old website still need to be migrated to the new platform. Dev work through Apr 6.
items.usecase: Completes platform modernization; removes legacy hosting dependency.
acceptanceCriteria: Performance parity with existing migrated pages

items.note: Add ReCAPTCHA to 50Above50 website to prevent bot submissions (same implementation as Khyaal website).
items.usecase: Protects 50A50 registration and entry forms from automated attacks.
acceptanceCriteria: reCAPTCHA v3 added to 50A50 registration form
reCAPTCHA v3 added to 50A50 entry submission form
No false positive blocking for legitimate users

items.text: Voice of Kalinga — landing page + communications setup
items.note: Landing page and communications setup for Voice of Kalinga event. Target: Apr 17.
items.usecase: Drives registrations for the event; promotes Khyaal brand in Kalinga region.
acceptanceCriteria: Event details, dates, registration information complete

items.text: Online Events on Web — web-based online event support
items.note: Build web-based online events support so users can join live events from the browser.
items.usecase: Expands event access beyond app users; increases engagement.
acceptanceCriteria: Online events visible and joinable on web

items.note: Implementing comprehensive event tracking for 50Above50 website covering user interactions (course views, certificate downloads, bundle purchases, category browsing, search queries) to enable complete attribution and funnel optimization in Pulse analytics.
items.usecase: Enables accurate campaign ROI measurement, identifies drop-off points in purchase funnel (expected 30% conversion improvement), and provides data foundation for personalized recommendations.
acceptanceCriteria: All user interaction events tracked (view, click, search, purchase)
Events appear in Pulse dashboard with <1 minute latency
Multi-step funnel analysis functional (browse → view → cart → purchase)
UTM parameters captured and attributed correctly

items.note: Addressing security vulnerabilities identified in VAPT assessment for 50Above50 platform including input validation gaps, session management weaknesses, and exposed admin endpoints. Lower priority than main platform due to limited PII and smaller attack surface.
items.usecase: Enhances security posture for 50Above50 platform, protects course content and user data, and maintains consistent security standards across all Khyaal properties.
acceptanceCriteria: All critical and high findings from VAPT report resolved
Input validation implemented on all user-facing forms
Admin endpoints properly secured with authentication
Security re-scan passes with acceptable risk level

items.note: Complete redesign of 50Above50 homepage with modern UI, improved visual hierarchy, and senior-friendly accessibility features.
items.usecase: Creates stronger first impression and improves user engagement by 25%, resulting in higher event registrations.
acceptanceCriteria: New design implemented with larger fonts and touch targets
Hero section highlights upcoming events prominently
Mobile-responsive design tested on common devices

items.note: Simplified category information pages with clearer descriptions, visual enhancements, and improved navigation for 50 categories.
items.usecase: Helps users understand 50Above50 program categories 40% faster, leading to better category selection and participation.
acceptanceCriteria: All 50 category pages updated with new design
Category descriptions simplified for senior audience
Visual icons added for quick category identification

items.note: Enabled self-service certificate download portal for participants who completed 50Above50 categories, with secure authentication.
items.usecase: Reduces support requests by 60% and provides instant certificate access to returning participants.
acceptanceCriteria: Download portal accessible from user dashboard
Certificates generated with user name and category
PDF format optimized for printing and sharing

items.note: Created bundled offer combining 50Above50 2026 registration with app membership at discounted price point.
items.usecase: Encourages membership sign-ups with 30% bundle discount, driving recurring revenue and user retention.
acceptanceCriteria: Bundle offer page created with clear pricing
Bundle automatically applies both registration and membership

items.note: Implemented coin-based redemption system allowing users to unlock 50Above50 categories using earned reward coins.
items.usecase: Increases platform engagement by 40% and provides gamification incentive for continued participation.
acceptanceCriteria: Coin redemption flow working on category pages
Coin balance updated in real-time after redemption
Category access granted immediately after redemption
Redemption history tracked in user profile

items.note: Refined category structure by merging overlapping categories, updating descriptions, and adding new categories while maintaining exactly 50 total. Migrated all existing user data to align with new structure.
items.usecase: Ensures consistent, optimized category framework for better content organization, user navigation, and program clarity.
acceptanceCriteria: All user data migrated without loss
New structure tested with sample users

items.note: Connected 50Above50 website lead forms to Zoho CRM for automated lead capture and nurturing workflows.
items.usecase: Improves lead tracking efficiency by 70% and enables automated follow-up campaigns for registrations.
acceptanceCriteria: All lead forms connected to Zoho API
Lead data synced in real-time to CRM

items.note: Integrated Pulse analytics SDK to track user behavior, category views, registrations, and engagement patterns across 50Above50 website.
items.usecase: Provides comprehensive analytics showing how users interact with categories, enabling data-driven program optimization.
acceptanceCriteria: Pulse SDK integrated on all pages
Key events tracked (category view, registration, certificate download)
Data flowing to Pulse analytics dashboard

items.note: Initiated comprehensive security review for 50Above50 website including vulnerability scanning and security best practices assessment.
items.usecase: Identifies potential security issues early, ensuring participant data protection and platform trustworthiness.

items.note: Planning seamless transition from website to mobile app for 50Above50 participants, including deep linking and context preservation.
items.usecase: Provides smoother cross-platform experience, reducing friction and improving app adoption by 35%.
acceptanceCriteria: Deep linking implemented for all category pages
A/B testing shows improved app adoption

items.note: New registration page shows ₹500 instead of ₹999 due to a cache issue.
items.usecase: Fixes incorrect pricing display that confuses new registrants.
acceptanceCriteria: No price mismatch between display and checkout

items.note: Dashboard button vanishes after token/cookie expiry. Check Token/Cookie TTL and contest caching.
items.usecase: Ensures users can always access their dashboard without hard-refreshing.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard button remains visible throughout session
No UI disappearance on TTL expiry

items.text: 50A50 submit entry redirects to home page instead of confirmation
items.note: Clicking Submit Entry redirects user back to home page. Likely token/cookie TTL or contest caching issue.
items.usecase: Users lose submission progress; fixing this prevents data loss and user frustration.
acceptanceCriteria: Submit Entry leads to confirmation screen
No unexpected redirect to home page

items.text: 50A50 dashboard button not persistent in website top bar
items.note: Dashboard button should be visible throughout the website top bar for all logged-in users.
items.usecase: Improves navigation and reduces friction for returning contestants.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard button visible in top bar on all pages for logged-in users

items.text: 50A50 upload entry flow — show submission format before uploading
items.note: Change upload flow so user sees required submission format/template before uploading their entry.
items.usecase: Reduces invalid submissions; improves first-time submission success rate.
acceptanceCriteria: Submission format/guidelines shown before upload prompt
Upload step comes after format review

items.note: Server-side API to support app-only entry submission for 50A50. Mobile UI handled in Khyaal Mobile workspace.
items.usecase: Enforces app-only upload policy to drive app downloads.
acceptanceCriteria: API endpoint accepts entry uploads from authenticated app users
Web upload disabled after feature ships
App upload validated correctly (file type, size, category)

items.note: Enhancing the speed and reliability of CRM data synchronization during migration.
items.usecase: Ensures CRM data is accurate, up-to-date, and reliable for reporting and decision-making.
items.blockerNote: Waiting on Zoho customer support response

items.note: Built comprehensive backend system for coin-based rewards with transaction tracking, balance management, and redemption history.
items.usecase: Enables users to redeem 50Above50 categories using earned coins, driving engagement and platform stickiness.

items.note: Developed bidirectional connector between 50Above50 CRM and Zoho CRM for automated data synchronization of leads, contacts, and activities.
items.usecase: Keeps lead records updated in real-time, enabling marketing automation and reducing manual data entry by 80%.
acceptanceCriteria: Bidirectional sync working for leads and contacts
Sync conflicts handled with priority rules

items.text: 50A50 category change asks ₹500 — category edit button missing
items.note: Changing category in the dashboard triggers a ₹500 charge. Category edit button needs to be added separately from the payment flow.
items.usecase: Allows contestants to correct category errors without being incorrectly charged.
acceptanceCriteria: Category edit button added to dashboard
Category change does not trigger payment
Category change saved correctly in CRM

items.text: 50A50 extra unchecked categories re-appear after manual dashboard entry
items.note: Unchecked categories re-appear after manual entry. Fix involves data script to remove impacted users and fixing pre-selected category display logic.
items.usecase: Ensures category list is clean and accurate; prevents duplicate/ghost category entries.
acceptanceCriteria: Impacted users cleaned up via data script
Pre-selected categories not duplicated on manual entry

items.text: 50A50 fresh user back-to-back entries showing ₹500 and ₹999 randomly
items.note: Fresh users making back-to-back contest entries randomly see ₹500 and ₹999. Pricing logic must be consistent.
items.usecase: Ensures consistent and correct pricing for all users.
acceptanceCriteria: Subsequent entries follow correct pricing rules
No random price flip between ₹500 and ₹999

items.text: 50A50 partially completed status stuck when deleting pending entry
items.note: Deleting a pending entry from the partially-completed list does not update the user status correctly.
items.usecase: Accurate status tracking ensures users can re-enter without being stuck in a limbo state.
acceptanceCriteria: Deleting pending entry updates status from partially-completed to open/eligible
Status update reflected immediately in dashboard

items.note: Add filter capability to the submission export feature — filter by category, status, or date range.
items.usecase: Reduces manual data filtering work for operations team.

items.note: Enhanced admin controls for Tambola game management including board generation, winner verification, and prize management features.
items.usecase: Makes Tambola event management 50% faster and reduces manual errors during game execution.

items.note: Simplified event creation and editing workflow with improved form validation, auto-save functionality, and streamlined UI.
items.usecase: Speeds up event setup by 60%, reducing admin time from 15 minutes to 6 minutes per event.
acceptanceCriteria: Form validation with clear error messages
Bulk edit capability for recurring events
Event templates for common event types

items.note: Organized events into hierarchical categories and sub-categories with filtering and search capabilities for better admin organization.
items.usecase: Improves event discoverability by 70% and makes event management more scalable as event inventory grows.
acceptanceCriteria: Filtering by category working in admin panel
Category assignment required for new events

items.note: Maintained backward compatibility for legacy admin workflows and data structures while migrating to new system architecture.
items.usecase: Avoids disruption for existing admin users and ensures zero downtime during system transitions.
acceptanceCriteria: All legacy admin functions still working
Deprecation warnings added for future removal

items.note: Delivered multiple admin panel improvements requested by product team including reporting enhancements, user management features, and workflow optimizations.
items.usecase: Supports product team needs and enables better business operations with enhanced admin capabilities.
acceptanceCriteria: All requested features implemented and tested
Training materials provided to admin users

items.text: Tambola ticket retention 7 days + event-only search filter
items.note: Discard Tambola tickets after 7 days. Search box in CMS should filter by that event tickets only.
items.usecase: Prevents clutter in the CMS ticket list; reduces confusion when managing multiple game sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Search box filters to event-specific tickets only

items.text: Events CMS: start time in column, link mandatory, upload image from CMS
items.note: Three CMS event improvements: (1) show start time in event list column; (2) make link field mandatory; (3) image upload from CMS instead of URL-only.
items.usecase: Reduces ops friction in event management; prevents events going live without links.
acceptanceCriteria: Events list column shows start time (not image URL)
Link field validation prevents save without value

items.text: Manual cache clear capability in CMS
items.note: Add a manual cache clear button in CMS so ops team can clear cache without developer intervention.
items.usecase: Reduces ops dependency on engineering for routine cache busting after content updates.
acceptanceCriteria: Cache clear button visible in CMS admin
Clicking clears relevant caches (API, CDN, page cache)

items.text: Bulk custom coin assignment via CMS
items.note: Allow bulk coin assignment to multiple users via CSV upload in CMS.
items.usecase: Reduces manual effort for campaign coin rewards; enables bulk operations team workflows.
acceptanceCriteria: CSV upload accepted with user_id and coin_amount columns
Bulk operation processed with success/failure count

items.text: Bulk User creation and Membership assignment
items.note: Allow batch creation of users and assignment of memberships via CSV upload in CMS.
items.usecase: Enables onboarding of corporate or community group members in bulk.
acceptanceCriteria: CSV upload accepted for batch user creation

items.text: CMS membership details page — single profile view (4-click to 1)
items.note: Currently viewing membership details requires 4 clicks + manual time conversion. New page consolidates all User Membership details (per Raissa Pinto spec) with assign membership flow.
items.usecase: Reduces ops time per member inquiry from ~2 min to <30 sec.
acceptanceCriteria: Single profile page shows all membership details
Fields per Raissa Pinto spec (dates, status, plan, payment history)
Assign membership flow on same page

items.text: Individual Roles: Event Manager + Support user types with separate logins
items.note: Create Event Manager and Support role types with separate CMS login. User list from Raissa Pinto.
items.usecase: Enables ops team members to manage events and support tickets without full admin access.
acceptanceCriteria: Event Manager role: can create/edit events, cannot access billing
Support role: can view user profiles and memberships, cannot edit
User list provisioned per Raissa Pinto spec

items.text: Membership status sync via Razorpay to Pulse
items.note:
update: pushed on dev and shared the reference file to reefaq for testing journey based on the above implemented event.

Capturing all membership status updates (e.g., initiated, charged, started, cancelled, expired) and sending them to Pulse via Razorpay webhook triggers.
items.usecase: Provides complete visibility of the user membership lifecycle for better tracking, automation, and engagement.
acceptanceCriteria: Events are sent to Pulse reliably

items.note: Building RESTful API infrastructure for upcoming Centerstage product vertical including artist/performer management, event coordination, booking workflows, and content distribution endpoints. Architecting with extensible design patterns to support future feature expansion.
items.usecase: Enables launch of new Centerstage product line for connecting performers with senior audiences, unlocks new revenue stream (projected $50K/month), and establishes API architecture patterns for future verticals.
acceptanceCriteria: Core API endpoints implemented (artists, events, bookings, content)
JWT-based authentication and role-based authorization working
API documentation published with Swagger/OpenAPI spec
Rate limiting and security headers configured

items.note: Implementing Redis-based queue architecture (Bull/BullMQ) for Centerstage backend to handle asynchronous tasks including video transcoding, notification delivery, content distribution, and booking confirmations. Enables horizontal scalability and graceful degradation under load.
items.usecase: Improves system throughput by 400%, enables processing of 1000+ concurrent bookings, provides job retry/failure handling (99.9% reliability), and supports future scale to 10K+ users without infrastructure redesign.
acceptanceCriteria: Redis queue system deployed with Bull/BullMQ
All async tasks migrated to queue (video, notifications, distribution)
Job monitoring dashboard showing queue health and throughput
Performance benchmarks show 4x improvement in concurrent request handling

items.note: Updated backend API endpoints for Tambola game features including board generation, winner declaration, and prize distribution logic.
items.usecase: Supports enhanced Tambola product flow with automated game management and real-time updates.
acceptanceCriteria: API endpoints for board creation working
Real-time game state updates via WebSocket

items.note: Enhanced API to support hierarchical event categories and sub-categories with improved querying and filtering capabilities.
items.usecase: Makes event setup cleaner and enables better event organization for admin and frontend teams.
acceptanceCriteria: Category metadata returned in event queries

items.note: Implemented API versioning and compatibility layer to maintain support for legacy client integrations during platform migration.
items.usecase: Prevents breaks during updates and ensures zero downtime for existing mobile app users.
acceptanceCriteria: Legacy endpoints maintained with deprecation warnings
All existing integrations tested and working

items.note: Migrated identity verification API from legacy KYC provider to new protocol with enhanced security and compliance features.
items.usecase: Keeps verification process compliant with updated regulations and improves verification success rate by 25%.
acceptanceCriteria: Fallback to legacy provider for failures

items.note: Added cursor-based pagination to event listing APIs for improved performance when handling large event datasets.
items.usecase: Makes the app 70% faster for users browsing event lists with hundreds of events.

items.note: Built complete RESTful API suite for ₹99 subscription management including purchase, renewal, cancellation, and status queries.
items.usecase: Supports subscription purchase and lifecycle management with automated billing integration.
acceptanceCriteria: Webhook handlers for payment events implemented

items.note: Implemented rule-based event access control system supporting membership tiers, user segments, and custom restrictions.
items.usecase: Controls who can join specific events based on membership status, enabling tiered access model.
acceptanceCriteria: Rule engine for access control implemented
Multiple restriction types supported (membership, segment, custom)
Clear error messages for denied access

items.note: Built API endpoints for coin-based redemption system with transaction management, balance queries, and redemption history.
items.usecase: Allows reward coin usage across the platform with real-time balance updates and transaction tracking.

items.note: Developed API integration layer connecting platform backend with Zoho CRM for bidirectional lead and contact synchronization.
items.usecase: Keeps CRM records in sync automatically, reducing manual data entry by 85% and enabling marketing automation.
acceptanceCriteria: Error handling and retry logic tested

items.note: Initiated comprehensive security testing for all API endpoints including authentication, authorization, and data validation.
items.usecase: Identifies API-level security vulnerabilities early and ensures data protection compliance.

items.note: Implementing API security fixes for vulnerabilities identified in penetration testing including authentication bypass, injection flaws, and authorization issues.
items.usecase: Strengthens API security posture and protects user data from potential exploits.

items.note: Planning real-time messaging backend API with WebSocket support for Centerstage chat and messenger features.
items.usecase: Enables future in-app messaging support for community interaction and peer-to-peer communication.

items.text: Support for app-code authentication in API
items.note: Implementing alternative authentication mechanism using temporary app-generated codes or QR codes instead of OTP, enabling seamless Web Zoom SDK integration.
items.usecase: Provides frictionless authentication for web-based event joining, reducing login time from 60s to 5s and improving attendance by 30%.
acceptanceCriteria: Code validation and JWT issuance working
Security audit completed for auth flow

items.note: Building streak tracking system API to monitor consecutive user activity (event attendance, task completion) with milestone rewards and gamification.
items.usecase: Encourages consistent engagement through gamification, increasing daily active users by 40% and improving retention.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard API for streak display implemented

items.text: Renewal issue fix — post-autopay cancel + renewal (CRON frequency)
items.note: Post autopay cancel + renewal flow was broken; required manual backend activation. Fixed by increasing CRON job frequency. Released Apr 2.
items.usecase: Ensures autopay renewal works end-to-end without manual intervention.
acceptanceCriteria: Renewal works automatically post autopay cancel
CRON frequency increased to handle timely processing

items.text: Full KYC fix — not working since Oct 2025
items.note: Full KYC was broken since Oct 2025. New flow released Apr 2. Users to be informed to retry KYC.
items.usecase: KYC compliance and user onboarding require this to work correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: New flow released and users notified to retry
No regression in partial KYC flow

items.text: KCMC card delivery copy: 15 business days + 30 min/day for printing
items.note: App currently shows 5-7 days. Change to 15 business days. Add 30 min daily for card printing (marketing).
items.usecase: Sets accurate delivery expectations; prevents support tickets.
acceptanceCriteria: App shows 15 business days for KCMC card delivery
Marketing note 30 min daily for printing included where appropriate

items.text: Remove Khyaal card track delivery from app
items.note: The Khyaal card track delivery feature needs to be removed from the app.
items.usecase: Removes deprecated feature to reduce confusion.
acceptanceCriteria: Khyaal card track delivery section removed from app UI
No broken references or crashes after removal

items.text: Digi-gold SIP: random monthly payment skip — setup Caratlane call + fix
items.note: Digi-gold SIP randomly skips monthly payments. Requires call with Caratlane team + log of recent failures.
items.usecase: Protects user investments; prevents SIP irregularities causing financial harm.
acceptanceCriteria: Caratlane call scheduled and root cause identified
All recent SIP failure cases logged
Fix deployed and verified with test SIP cycle
No payment skips in subsequent monitoring period

items.text: Digi-gold one-time payment: payment fails but amount gets deducted
items.note: One-time digi-gold payment fails on platform but user bank account is debited. Jayram & Alfa cases documented.
items.usecase: Prevents financial harm to users; critical compliance issue.
acceptanceCriteria: Deducted amount either refunded or gold credited
Monitoring in place to detect future mismatches

items.text: Login/Join OTP: Oops something went wrong — better error message
items.note: After OTP entry some users see Oops something went wrong due to network issues. Better error message with retry guidance needed.
items.usecase: Reduces user confusion and support tickets for temporary network errors.

items.text: Cached Old Categories Re-Migration — platform API cleanup
items.note: Old category data cached in the platform API needs to be cleaned up and re-migrated to prevent stale data issues.
items.usecase: Prevents stale category data from surfacing to users; required for 50A50 category fix completeness.
acceptanceCriteria: Category data re-migrated from source of truth
No stale categories visible in any platform surface

items.note: Server-side upgrade for the Khyaal App Assistant Bot to v2.0.1. Mobile UI upgrade in Khyaal Mobile workspace.
items.usecase: Improves assistant response quality and adds new capabilities.
acceptanceCriteria: Server API updated to v2.0.1 spec
Mobile app assistant works with new server API
No regression in existing assistant functionality

items.text: Offline Events — server-side API (register, view booked events, tickets, info)
items.note: Build server-side API for Offline Events. Mobile UI in Khyaal Mobile workspace.
items.usecase: Enables users to discover, register for, and manage offline events from the app.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /events returns offline events list with pagination
Event info endpoint returns full event details

items.text: Zoho CRM for Travel setup — driven by Pulse Journey

items.usecase: Enables Travel team to manage leads and customer journeys in a CRM.
acceptanceCriteria: Zoho CRM instance configured for Travel team

items.text: Parents Day Campaign (Jun 1 release) — dev start May 10
items.note: Campaign targeting Jun 1 (Parents Day). Dev must start by May 10 for May 8 release.

acceptanceCriteria: Campaign landing page live by May 8

items.note: Build a Pulse dashboard view for membership metrics — new vs renewing members, churn rate, plan distribution.
items.usecase: Gives leadership data-driven visibility into membership health.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard shows new and renewing member counts

items.note: Migrated Pulse analytics infrastructure from AWS to Google Cloud Platform (GCP) including data pipelines, storage, and compute workloads.
items.usecase: Improves platform stability and reduces operational complexity while consolidating cloud providers for better cost management.
acceptanceCriteria: All Pulse data pipelines migrated to GCP

items.note: Optimized GCP resource utilization through rightsizing instances, implementing autoscaling policies, and eliminating unused resources.

acceptanceCriteria: Autoscaling policies configured for all services

items.note: Implemented secure session management for Pulse analytics console with JWT-based authentication, session timeout, and refresh token support.
items.usecase: Makes console access smoother for analytics users with persistent sessions and auto-login capabilities, reducing login friction by 80%.

items.note: Optimized database queries and indexing strategies for user analytics dashboards, reducing query execution time by 70%.
items.usecase: Improves user reporting performance from 15s to 4s average load time, enabling faster data-driven decisions.
acceptanceCriteria: Database indexes optimized for common queries
Query plan analysis shows improved performance

items.note: Added filtering capabilities for null and empty values in user analytics queries, enabling identification of incomplete user profiles.
items.usecase: Helps identify and fix data quality issues by finding users with missing profile information for targeted outreach.
acceptanceCriteria: Null/empty filters working for all user attributes
Filter UI clearly shows null vs empty distinction
Query performance not degraded by null filters

items.note: Implemented chronological activity timeline for individual users showing all events, status changes, and interactions over time.
items.usecase: Improves customer journey visibility and enables support teams to quickly understand user history and context.
acceptanceCriteria: Timeline shows all user events chronologically
Event details expandable for more context
Performance tested with users having 1000+ events

items.note: Implemented near real-time data synchronization pipeline updating user profiles in Pulse analytics within 30 seconds of source changes.
items.usecase: Makes journey triggers and segment evaluations more current with <30s data latency instead of hourly batch updates.
acceptanceCriteria: User data synced within 30 seconds of changes
Sync errors handled with retry logic

items.note: Optimized event analytics queries through improved indexing, query restructuring, and caching strategies, reducing load time by 65%.
items.usecase: Makes event analytics reporting more responsive, improving from 20s to 7s average dashboard load time.
acceptanceCriteria: Event indexes optimized for common patterns
Caching implemented for frequently accessed data

items.note: Added null and empty value filtering for event properties, enabling data quality analysis and identification of incomplete event tracking.
items.usecase: Improves data quality visibility by identifying events with missing properties for debugging and tracking improvements.
acceptanceCriteria: Null filters working for all event properties
UI clearly distinguishes null vs empty values

items.note: Implemented Indian Standard Time (IST) timezone display for all event timestamps in analytics dashboards and reports.
items.usecase: Makes event timing data easier to read and understand for India-based teams, eliminating UTC conversion confusion.
acceptanceCriteria: All timestamps displayed in IST by default
User preference for timezone selection working

items.note: Added null and empty value filtering in segment and cohort definition rules, enabling precise targeting based on missing data.
items.usecase: Makes audience targeting more accurate by identifying users with incomplete profiles for re-engagement campaigns.
acceptanceCriteria: Null filters working in segment builder
Cohort rules support null value conditions
Filter preview shows accurate user counts

items.note: Enabled importing external user lists (CSV uploads, API integrations) for use in segmentation and cohort building.

items.text: Clone support for segments and cohorts
items.note: Implemented one-click cloning for segments and cohorts, allowing quick duplication and modification of existing audience definitions.
items.usecase: Saves time when creating similar audiences, reducing setup from 10 minutes to 1 minute for variant audiences.
acceptanceCriteria: Clone button available on all segments and cohorts

items.text: Utility support for DOB, current time, and event time
items.note: Added advanced date and time-based filtering utilities including birthday calculations, relative time comparisons, and event timing logic.
items.usecase: Makes targeting more flexible with birthday campaigns, time-sensitive promotions, and behavior-based timing rules.
acceptanceCriteria: DOB-based filters working (birthday this month, age range)
Current time comparisons functional (time of day, day of week)
Event time relative filters working (last 7 days, between dates)

items.note: Implemented automated cohort refresh schedules (daily, weekly, monthly) to keep dynamic audience lists up-to-date automatically.
items.usecase: Keeps audience lists current without manual intervention, ensuring campaigns always target the right users.

items.text: Fix Journey first node identification flag
items.note: Implementing validation logic in Journey Builder to enforce exactly one entry node (fromTriggerNode: true) before allowing save/publish operations. Adding clear error messaging and visual indicators in UI when entry node is missing or multiple entry nodes exist, preventing runtime journey failures.
items.usecase: Prevents 100% of journey execution failures caused by missing/ambiguous entry points (currently ~15% of journeys fail), reduces support tickets by 40%, improves journey builder UX with real-time validation feedback, and ensures all published journeys are executable.
acceptanceCriteria: Save/publish blocked if zero or multiple fromTriggerNode:true nodes exist
Clear error toast/banner shows specific issue and resolution steps
Visual indicator in canvas highlights entry node or shows missing entry state
Existing journeys with invalid state flagged for review in dashboard

items.note: Enabled journeys to trigger and process users from external data sources (CSV uploads, API imports) in addition to platform users.
items.usecase: Expands campaign reach to offline and third-party audiences, enabling unified omnichannel journeys.
acceptanceCriteria: External users can enter journeys via API
Journey actions work for external users
User data merged correctly during journey execution

items.note: Implemented one-click journey duplication allowing marketers to copy complex journey configurations and modify for new campaigns.
items.usecase: Speeds up journey setup from 30 minutes to 5 minutes by reusing proven journey templates.
acceptanceCriteria: Clone button available on journey dashboard
All journey steps and conditions cloned correctly

items.text: Utility support for DOB, current time, and event time
items.note: Added advanced date/time-based journey logic including birthday triggers, time-of-day actions, and event timing comparisons.
items.usecase: Improves journey personalization with birthday wishes, optimal send time logic, and behavior-based timing rules.
acceptanceCriteria: DOB-based triggers working (birthday today, this week, this month)
Time-of-day actions functional (morning vs evening sends)
Event time comparisons working (within X days of event)

items.note: Optimized journey execution engine through improved queue processing, parallel execution, and database query optimization reducing latency by 60%.
items.usecase: Handles 10x more concurrent journeys reliably with improved speed and reduced server load.

items.note: Added sophisticated conditional journey entry logic based on user attributes, behavior patterns, and event combinations.
items.usecase: Targets users more precisely by triggering journeys only when multiple conditions are met (e.g., high-value user + cart abandonment).
acceptanceCriteria: Multiple condition types supported (attribute, event, segment)
Condition preview shows accurate user counts

items.note: Added null and empty value filtering in journey decision nodes, enabling branching based on missing data.
items.usecase: Makes journey flows more accurate by handling users with incomplete data differently (e.g., request missing info).
acceptanceCriteria: Null filters working in all decision nodes
Journey branches correctly based on null values

items.note: Added journey action nodes for automatically logging data to Google Sheets and sending Slack notifications during journey execution.
items.usecase: Reduces manual follow-up work by 75% through automated data logging and team notifications for key journey events.
acceptanceCriteria: Google Sheets action writes data correctly

items.note: Implemented user tagging within journeys and tag-based filtering for journey entry and decision nodes.
items.usecase: Improves targeting and personalization by dynamically tagging users based on journey behavior and filtering by tags.
acceptanceCriteria: Tag filters functional in entry and decision nodes

items.note: Enable dynamic logic creation within user journeys using custom expressions (JavaScript-like syntax) for advanced personalization and decision-making.
items.usecase: Allows defining complex dynamic conditions to control journey flow, enabling highly personalized actions and branching based on calculated user data.
acceptanceCriteria: Common functions library available (math, date, string)

items.note: Implemented automated synchronization of Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) device tokens from app to Pulse campaign system.

acceptanceCriteria: Token sync working in real-time on app launch

items.note: Enabled automatic Firebase topic creation and subscription management based on user segments and cohorts.
items.usecase: Speeds up messaging to new audiences by automatically creating topic groups, reducing setup time from 10 minutes to instant.
acceptanceCriteria: Topic unsubscription on segment exit working

items.note: Implemented campaign scheduling feature allowing marketers to set future send times for push notification and email campaigns.
items.usecase: Improves campaign timing with optimal send times, enabling better engagement rates through strategic scheduling.
acceptanceCriteria: Campaigns sent at scheduled time accurately
Cancel option available for scheduled campaigns

items.note: Built comprehensive campaign history and logging interface showing all sent campaigns with delivery metrics, audience details, and content.

acceptanceCriteria: Campaign history showing all past campaigns
Delivery metrics displayed (sent, delivered, opened, clicked)

items.text: Sales Agent – Specific Tours Pilot launch testing, stakeholder alignment
items.note: Conducting internal pilot of AI Sales Agent for specific tour packages with 20-30 controlled test calls, gathering stakeholder feedback from sales team and management, refining conversation flows based on real interactions, and validating conversion metrics before full-scale deployment.
items.usecase: De-risks AI agent deployment through controlled validation (prevents potential brand damage), achieves internal buy-in from sales team (critical for adoption), establishes conversion baseline (target 10-15% in pilot), and identifies edge cases for prompt refinement before scaling to 1000+ calls/month.
acceptanceCriteria: 20-30 pilot calls completed with recorded transcripts and outcomes
Stakeholder review meeting conducted with sales and management teams
Feedback incorporated into prompts and edge case handling improved

items.note: Finalizing conversation scripts including sales pitch, closure, and intent/ratings handling.
items.usecase: Improves quality of conversations and increases chances of successful conversions.

items.text: Plivo setup for India & recording feasibility
items.note: Setting up Plivo for Indian numbers and checking recording support and associated costs. Manual recording remains a fallback option.
items.usecase: Enables scalable calling infrastructure for India with clarity on recording capabilities.

items.note: Exploring call recording setup with Plivo, including feasibility and cost. Manual recording is possible but requires additional effort.
items.usecase: Helps review calls, improve quality, and maintain records for training and compliance.

items.note: Built AI-powered voice agent using LLM and text-to-speech technology to handle initial sales calls automatically with natural conversation flow.
items.usecase: Helps reach out to 5x more users faster while reducing manual calling effort by 70%, enabling scalable tour promotion.
acceptanceCriteria: AI agent makes outbound calls successfully
Natural conversation flow tested with sample users
Call transfer to human agent working when needed

items.text: AI Sales Agent – Call summarization setup
items.note: Implemented automated call summarization using AI transcription and LLM analysis. Working via Exotel; evaluating Plivo where recording is limited.
items.usecase: Provides instant call insights and summaries without manual review, saving 80% of supervisor review time.
acceptanceCriteria: AI summary captures key points (interest level, objections, next steps)
Summary quality validated by sales team

items.note: Configured AI calling agent with tour-specific knowledge base including tour details, pricing, FAQs, and objection handling for targeted conversations.
items.usecase: Enables personalized outreach for specific tours with accurate information, improving engagement and conversion rates by 25%.
acceptanceCriteria: Tour knowledge base integrated with agent
Objection responses configured for common scenarios

items.text: Sales Agent – Specific Tours Pilot launch tesing, stakeholder alignment
items.note: Preparing for internal pilot testing by aligning stakeholders, refining prompts and responses, and gathering initial feedback for improvements.
items.usecase: Ensures the AI sales agent is validated internally with real scenarios before external rollout, reducing launch risks.
acceptanceCriteria: Pilot test plan created and approved
Test calls completed with 10+ internal users

items.note: Upgrading AI assistant with improved LLM model, better context handling, memory persistence, and enhanced response quality using RAG architecture.
items.usecase: Provides smarter, more contextual assistance with 50% better response relevance to enhance user engagement and support quality.
acceptanceCriteria: New LLM model integrated and tested
Context window expanded for longer conversations
Response quality improved (measured by user ratings)

items.note: Engineering 50+ Gold Tier analytical features from raw event data including behavioral aggregations (30-day activity scores, event participation rates), engagement metrics (session duration, interaction depth), temporal patterns (weekly activity cycles, preferred time slots), and derived attributes (user lifecycle stage, churn risk indicators) using Spark/pandas for batch processing.
items.usecase: Transforms raw event streams into actionable business intelligence enabling segmentation accuracy improvement of 60%, predictive model performance boost of 45% (AUC score), and unlocks advanced analytics dashboards showing behavioral cohorts, engagement trends, and retention drivers.
acceptanceCriteria: Minimum 50 features engineered covering behavioral, temporal, and engagement dimensions
Feature documentation includes business definition, calculation logic, and usage examples
Data quality validation shows <5% null values and logical consistency checks pass
Features materialized in Gold Tier tables with daily refresh schedule

items.note: Designing normalized dimensional data models for Gold Tier analytics layer using Kimball methodology - implementing fact tables for user events/sessions, dimension tables for users/content/time, and slowly changing dimensions (SCD Type 2) for tracking attribute history. Optimizing schema for analytical query performance with partitioning and indexing strategies.
items.usecase: Provides structured, query-optimized data foundation enabling 10x faster analytics queries (vs Bronze/Silver layers), supports complex joins and aggregations for BI dashboards, ensures data lineage and auditability, and establishes scalable schema for future analytics expansion.
acceptanceCriteria: Star schema implemented with fact and dimension tables documented
Schema documentation includes entity relationships and cardinality
Data migration scripts tested for Bronze/Silver → Gold transformation
Query performance benchmarks show 10x improvement over raw data

items.note: Defining and implementing 20+ business-critical metrics for Gold Tier including engagement KPIs (DAU/MAU, session duration, feature adoption), conversion metrics (funnel completion rates, revenue per user), retention indicators (cohort retention curves, churn probability), and operational metrics (data freshness, pipeline health) with automated quality monitoring.
items.usecase: Establishes single source of truth for business metrics eliminating conflicting numbers (current 40% variance), enables real-time business health monitoring, provides automated alerting for anomalies (>20% deviation), and supports data-driven decision making across all teams.
acceptanceCriteria: Minimum 20 business metrics defined with clear calculation logic documented
Metrics accessible via dashboards with drill-down capabilities
Automated alerts configured for anomalies and threshold breaches
Metric validation shows <3% variance vs. source systems

items.note: Deploying Gold Tier analytics dashboards covering membership trends, event performance, revenue metrics, and engagement KPIs. Dashboards serve all three personas with persona-specific data density and are accessible in exec-view mode without requiring CMS credentials.
items.usecase: Makes data-driven insights easily accessible for teams to monitor performance and make informed decisions.
acceptanceCriteria: Gold Tier analytics dashboard live with membership, event, and revenue KPIs
Real-time data updates with < 30s latency confirmed via load test
All 3 persona views (PM, Exec, Dev) render correct filtered data
Dashboard accessible in exec mode without CMS credentials

items.note: Engineering the ML feature set that powers the recommendation and personalization engines. Covers 50+ signals including user demographics, content affinity scores, event attendance history, engagement recency, and purchase patterns. Features are stored in a versioned feature store and refreshed on a scheduled pipeline to ensure model freshness.
items.usecase: Improves model accuracy and strength of recommendations.
acceptanceCriteria: 50+ features engineered covering user demographics, behavioral signals, event affinity, and engagement recency
Feature store populated and validated against 90-day historical data
Feature pipeline runs on scheduled refresh with < 5% data staleness
Baseline model accuracy established at ≥ 70% before persona engine integration

items.note: Integrating long-term and contextual memory using Mem0 and Neo4j.
items.usecase: Enables deeper personalization based on user memory and behavior.

items.usecase: Predicts user needs and preferences proactively.

items.text: Script for local environment of GCP
items.note: Script for local environment of GCP for testing

items.usecase: Reduces deployment cycle time by 60% (2 days → 8 hours) through earlier bug detection, eliminates 'works on my machine' issues, enables parallel development without environment conflicts, and provides safe testing ground for infrastructure changes before production deployment.
acceptanceCriteria: Full staging stack runs locally with single command (docker-compose up)
CI/CD pipeline executes integration tests against local staging
Comprehensive documentation with troubleshooting guide published
Team trained and using local staging for pre-deployment validation
